name: lucet
description: Simple package to support AI explanation and analysis of code function

lucet.dwellMs.description: Delay in milliseconds the cursor must dwell before Lucet triggers analysis.

lucet.modifier.description: Modifier held while hovering to escalate from glance to deep dive.

lucet.glanceModel.description: Model used for the glance tier. Falls back to a Sonnet model if Haiku is not selectable on the subscription path.

lucet.deepDiveModel.description: Model used for the deep-dive and why tiers.

lucet.languages.description: Language identifiers for which the Lucet hover provider is registered.

lucet.monthlyCreditUSD.description: Monthly Agent SDK credit in USD, used as the denominator of the status-bar cost meter.

lucet.whyRetrievalSteps.description: Maximum agentic retrieval steps the why tier may take, so one expansion cannot crawl the whole repo.

lucet.pivotLanguage.description: Target language for the "As Python" comprehension view. The button is hidden when the source is already this language.

lucet.pivotModel.description: Model used to render the "As Python" view.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
